M-073.NAME: premium-public-site
M-073.path: frontend/src/App.tsx frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx frontend/src/index.css frontend/src/pages/Login.tsx frontend/src/pages/Register.tsx frontend/src/pages/ForgotPassword.tsx frontend/src/pages/ResetPassword.tsx frontend/src/pages/VerifyEmail.tsx frontend/src/pages/Landing.tsx docs/plans/Phase-56.xml scripts/phase56-premium-public-auth-smoke.mjs
M-073.owns: Premium public entry, auth, registration, verification, and password recovery surfaces.
M-073.purpose: Present KrotPN as a premium Matrix/cyberpunk product while keeping registration and email verification clear.

exports.view-public-entry: Immersive first screen with KrotPN offer, VPN/MTProto value, tariffs, and direct registration CTA.
exports.view-premium-auth: Compact premium login/register/reset/verify screens with logo and clear state feedback.
exports.view-tariff-preview: Server-authoritative tariff presentation without frontend-controlled pricing or limits.

constraints.constraint-1: Do not issue or imply VPN, trial, JWT, referral, or MTProto access before verified email proof.
constraints.constraint-2: Public visual effects must not slow or obscure registration, reset, or verification forms.
constraints.constraint-3: Tariff information must stay aligned with M-068 canonical backend catalog.

acceptance-metrics.metric-1: Frontend build passes and public/auth route smoke covers mobile, tablet, desktop, and reduced-motion.
acceptance-metrics.metric-2: Registration pending and duplicate-email recovery states remain clear and token-safe.

execution-evidence.local-2026-06-03: Phase-56 added the public / landing route, moved authenticated user cabinet routes under /dashboard with legacy redirects, added visible logo lockups to auth flows, added compact public tariff preview verified against M-068, added scripts/phase56-premium-public-auth-smoke.mjs, passed frontend build, Phase-44/46/50/52/53/55 regression smokes, captured Chrome screenshot matrix in /tmp/krotpn-phase56-screenshots, passed XML/MyGRACE/diff checks, and kept deploy/install/backend/VPN/MTProto/billing runtime surfaces untouched.

M-073.hotspot: H-060: Public/auth premium presentation must not delay registration, hide verification states, or imply access before email proof.
